name: Utilizing E-Tools
description:
The General Services Administration (GSA) offers a suite of integrated e-tools to make the acquisition process more efficient for small businesses. These complimentary e-tools help you perform market research, locate contracting opportunities, and more. Join the GSA Office of Small and Disadvantaged Business Utilization (OSDBU) and the West Virginia Apex Accelerator as they team to introduce GSA’s e-tools and methods for your business to gain an advantage in achieving acquisition efficiency. 
This APEX Accelerator is funded in part through a cooperative agreement with the Department of Defense.

name: Small Business Banking Services
description:
Learn about small business financing options, other banking services, and fraud prevention in this practical workshop designed to help your business thrive. 
There are various financing options and funding sources available, and we’ll compare what banks and alternative lenders can provide to help businesses succeed. There are a diverse range of other banking services available including advanced account features like reporting and bundling, innovative payment solutions, and merchant services that can support business growth. Lastly, we’ll review the best guidance available for safeguarding your business by recognizing and preventing fraud and scams. 
Join the West Virginia District Office of the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) and the West Virginia Small Business Administration for the series Money Smart for Small Business. This series provides a practical introduction to starting and managing a business that is ideal for both aspiring and established entrepreneurs. The series was developed jointly by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FIDC) and the SBA. Each virtual session comes with a practical workbook guide. Sessions are Wednesdays at 11:30 am beginning March 18, 2026, through May 27, 2026. Register for the sessions that fit your schedule and needs. These sessions will not be recorded.

name: Money Smart: Organizational Types
description:
Pros and Cons of Business Structures
Confused about the type of business structure you should use? Explore with us the pros and cons of each type to determine which organizational type best fits your small business goals.
We’ll explore the unique characteristics, benefits, and potential drawbacks of:
• Sole Proprietorship
• Partnerships
• Limited Liability Company (LLC)
• C-Corporation
• S-Corporation

name: Money Smart: Recordkeeping
description:
Learn practical recordkeeping skills and tools to make smarter decisions and streamline your small business operations.
We’ll cover:
• Essential recordkeeping practices
• How these recordkeeping methods function in everyday operations
• Exploring software solutions designed to simplify small business recordkeeping

name: West Virginia Entrepreneurship Ecosystem Monthly Meeting
description: [vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”” css_params=””]Join the West Virginia Entrepreneurship Ecosystem for our monthly virtual meeting, where partners from across the state come together to share updates, highlight resources, and collaborate on ways to support entrepreneurs. This session includes brief presentations, open discussion, and opportunities to connect with others working to strengthen West Virginia’s entrepreneurial landscape. All are welcome![/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

name: Bridging Innovation Week 2026
description:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css=”” css_params=””]Bridging Innovation Week is the state’s premier ​entrepreneurship event. The annual symposium ​advances entrepreneurship-led economic ​development by providing connection and education ​to business owners, current and prospective ​entrepreneurs, and entrepreneur serving ​organizations (ESOs) throughout West Virginia. 
Whether you’re just starting or looking to scale, this is ​the place to explore entrepreneurship opportunities ​in the Mountain State! Join us in Morgantown, WV on April 27 – May 1, 2026. To learn more or to register for Bridging Innovation Week 2026 visit https://www.wveshipecosystem.com.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]
